truct HistoryEntryDto {
    pub id: String,
    pub content: String,
    pub recorded_at: chrono::DateTime<chrono::Utc>,
    pub valid_from: chrono::DateTime<chrono::Utc>,
    pub valid_to: Option<chrono::DateTime<chrono::Utc>>,
    pub is_current: bool,
}
pub struct EdgeDto {
    pub from: String,
    pub to: String,
    pub relation: String,
    pub metadata: Option<serde_json::Value>,
}
